raw_consumer_statement:
I purchased XXXX XXXXXXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX from XXXX. On XX/XX/XXXX and XX/XX/XXXX One arrived with a defective XXXX  and the other stripped the center diff in 2 uses I attempted to return them to XXXX but the only return option they would give is XXXX  pickup, and XXXX  came once three days after the return when I was out. They never returned. 

Two weeks later while still within the return date I raised the issue with XXXX, they assured me XXXX  would show up and they did show up two days later to pick up only one of the trucks. ( the one with bad center diff purchased on XX/XX/XXXX ) The other remained with me with XXXX  making no further attempts till the date the return expired. Sensing they werent coming to get it a week before the date I filed a dispute with citi citing the defects. XX/XX/XXXX Citi took 6 weeks to get back to me about the dispute. When they finally did ( XXXX ) they denied it because they said XXXX confirmed they issued a credit. ( XXXX mistook the credit for the other truck as the credit for this one ) Citi closed the dispute and I have spent the last month trying to get them to re open it each time they say they will and to wait 7-10 business days. Last night I called Citi and they said they could not open the dispute unless I had proof XXXX said theyd return my money. 

Ive emailed the dispute and am waiting ANOTHER 7-10 business days for them to see it. Im doubtful of a resolution to this, at least one in my favor.
